publication.changeSummary: Deterministic misconception item for Pull policy; blocked from formal exams until independent human review.

items.title: Pull policy: correct the failure model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this documented beginner mistake? Pull only downloads remote data and therefore cannot create commits, replay work, or cause conflicts.

examEligibility.rationale: The deterministic answer and rubric are AI-assisted draft content awaiting independent human approval.

hints: Compare both options with the canonical model, declared boundary, and observable evidence in the lesson.

feedback.correct: Correct. Treat pull as fetch plus integration, know the selected strategy, inspect state first, and test the resulting local history and files.
feedback.incorrect: The selected statement preserves the documented misconception. Treat pull as fetch plus integration, know the selected strategy, inspect state first, and test the resulting local history and files.

criteria.description: Selects the source-aligned correction for Pull policy instead of the documented misconception.

privateAuthorNotes: Human reviewer must verify the correction against the cited source and ensure the misconception option is plausible without reinforcing it.

options.text: Treat pull as fetch plus integration, know the selected strategy, inspect state first, and test the resulting local history and files.
Pull only downloads remote data and therefore cannot create commits, replay work, or cause conflicts.

answer.explanation: Treat pull as fetch plus integration, know the selected strategy, inspect state first, and test the resulting local history and files.
